name: Almond Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified on the yeast packaging.
2. In a large bowl, combine the nonfat dried milk, applesauce, almond paste, almond extract, sugar, and salt.
3. Add the oats and bread flour to the dry ingredients, and mix well until evenly distributed.
4. Stir in the yeast.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased loaf pan.
6. Bake according to the yeast package instructions.
7. Allow the bread to cool completely before removing it from the pan.
